overview: Bonam Venkata Chalamayya Institute of Technology and Science (BVCITS), established in 2002, is a premier private engineering college located in Batlapalem, Amalapuram. It is part of the BVC Group of Institutions and is known for its strong academic focus in the Konaseema region of Andhra Pradesh.
accreditation: Accredited by NAAC with an 'A' Grade and NBA. Approved by AICTE and affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada (JNTUK).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, AI&DS, ECE, EEE, ME, Civil)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + AP EAMCET
Graduation with Maths at 10+2 or Degree level + AP ICET
B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch + GATE/AP PGECET

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through APSCHE counseling. 70% of seats are Convener Quota (Category A) based on entrance ranks, and 30% are Management Quota (Category B) based on merit. Lateral entry is available for Diploma holders via AP ECET.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAMCET 2026: May 2026; AP ICET 2026: May 2026; Counseling: June-July 2026.

facilities: Separate Hostels for Boys and Girls
campus.specialNote: The institute is highly regarded for its disciplined environment and is located near the scenic town of Amalapuram. It offers extensive scholarship programs including Government Fee Reimbursement and merit-based incentives.

contact.address: Batlapalem, Amalapuram, East Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh - 533221
